translation.literal_translation: And from what further reason is Pradhana not the cause of the world? -
translation.technical_translation: Transition opening the next exclusion rationale after gati-samanya.
translation.interpretive_note: Prepares the subsequent sutra argument chain.

lexical_notes.headword_iast: kutaś ca na pradhānaṃ jagataḥ kāraṇam
lexical_notes.gloss: what further denies Pradhana as world-cause?
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Question-form launches the sutra that formalizes cross-text convergence reasoning.
alternate_glosses: why not Pradhana as cosmic cause?

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Transitional prompt tightens focus from discourse argument to canonical sutra closure.
Shows method of stacked reasons rather than one-shot refutation.
Moves from sleep-based indicator to corpus-wide trajectory principle.

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S01 pass with stable inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit svapya etymological nuances and gati-samanya phrasing in records 1.1.040-1.1.047.
